# Buildwise Media
> AI-powered marketing agency for service businesses

## About
Buildwise Media is an AI-native marketing agency that builds Revenue Engines for service-based businesses. We handle everything: website, ads, content, follow-up, AI business tools, and optimization. Month-to-month. You own everything we build.

## Services
- Revenue Engine: Complete done-for-you marketing system ($3,500-$5,999/month)
  - Conversion-built website (PageSpeed 90+, 6 schema types, AEO-optimized)
  - Paid ads management (Google + Meta, no percentage-of-ad-spend fee)
  - 12 ad creatives per month
  - Social media management (5-6 platforms)
  - AI business tools (chatbot, voice AI, text-to-pay, review collection)
  - Automated follow-up (under 5-minute response time)
  - Strategy and continuous optimization
  - Analytics dashboard
  - SEO + AI Engine Optimization (AEO)
  - Google Business Profile management

## Key Differentiators
- AI-native: 80% of production automated, 20% human strategy and quality gates
- Month-to-month contracts (no lock-in)
- You own everything we build (website, content, data, automations)
- 71 documented processes
- Content quality threshold: 8/10 or it doesn't ship
- 47-point SEO checklist
- PageSpeed 90+ verified before launch

## Industries Served
HVAC, Pest Control, Landscaping, Roofing, Plumbing, Electrical, Cleaning, Home Services, Health & Wellness, Renewable Energy, Automotive Repair, Real Estate

## Pricing
- Ascend: $5,999/month (full Revenue Engine)
- Ascend Lite: $3,500/month (core engine)
- All plans month-to-month, no long-term lock-in

- Website: https://buildwisemedia.com

- Location: Tucker, GA (serving businesses nationwide)

## Proof
- Client case study: RutherfordMade went from $300K to $10M run rate
- Pipeline generated: $20M+
- Average lead increase: 3-5×
- Hours saved weekly: 18+
